title: narcissus × aurantius
intro: Narcissus × aurantius, also known as the jonquil or jessamine, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Amaryllidaceae family, derived from the cross between Narcissus pseudonarcissus and Narcissus jonquilla. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic qualities. The health benefits of Narcissus × aurantius include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, depression, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain. Herbal preparations of Narcissus × aurantius are typically made into teas, tinctures, or essential oils, and are used to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and soothe respiratory issues.
